title: K Manga Adds Mom in Dungeon Manga
content: Kodansha 's K MANGA platform announced on Saturday it has added Shinichi Kamogawa 's manga adaptation of Yūko 's Mom in Dungeon: Making Ends Meet Every Day! ( Okaa-san Bōkensha, Login Bonus de Skill "Shufu" ni Mezameshita. Shūichi Moraeru Chirashi de Bōkensha Seikatsu Ganbarimasu!
author: ANN

title: sora's Tsuiraku JK to Haijin Kyōshi Manga Gets Extra Chapter
content: The extra chapter tells the story of [highlight the white text to read spoilers] Mikoto Ochiai and Jin Haiba's child. sora launched the manga in Hakusensha 's Hana to Yume magazine in July 2017, initially intended to be a short series, but eventually developing into a long-term serialization.
author: ANN

title: 'Boushoku no Berserk' Gets Second Season
content: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Ichika Isshiki 's Boushoku no Berserk ( Berserk of Gluttony ) light novel announced a second season on Monday, revealing an announcement visual (pictured). Produced by A.C.G.T. , the first season aired in 12 episodes in Fall 2023.
author: MyAnimeList

title: TBATE Season 2 Reveals New Trailer for Upcoming Elderwood Arc
content: The Beginning After The End ( TBATE ) Season 2 revealed a new trailer for the Elderwood Arc, which will begin with Episode 5 on April 29. Keitaro Motonaga is directing The Beginning After The End anime at studio A-CAT.
author: Anime Corner

title: My Stepmother and Stepsisters Aren't Wicked TV Anime's Teaser Unveils New Cast, Staff Members, July Debut
content: NBC Universal revealed the teaser promotional video, main visual, additional cast and staff members, and the July debut for the television anime of Otsuji 's My Stepmother and Stepsisters Aren't Wicked ( Ibitte Konai Gibo to Gishi ) manga (the Japanese manga and anime write the English title as: My mother-in-law and…
author: ANN

title: Berserk of Gluttony TV Anime Gets 2nd Season
content: Point Set announced on Monday that the television anime of Ichika Isshiki and fame 's Berserk of Gluttony ( Bōshoku no Berserk: Ore Dake Level to Iu Gainen wo Toppa Suru ) light novel series is getting a second season. The announcement comes with a visual featuring the characters Fate Graphite and Roxy.
author: ANN

title: Berserk of Gluttony Season 2 Officially Announced
content: Berserk of Gluttony Season 2 has been officially announced, revealing a teaser visual featuring Fate and Roxy. The first season ran for 12 episodes from October to December 2023, with animation by studio ACGT.
author: Anime Corner

title: Re:Zero Light Novels Cross 16 Million Copies in Circulation Worldwide
content: Kadokawa 's listing for the 45th compiled volume of Tatsuhira Nagatsuki's Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- light novel series states that the series has crossed 16 million copies in circulation worldwide, including digital copies sold. The volume will ship on June 25.
author: ANN

title: No Game, No Life Chapter 2: Eastern Union Manga Resumes After 16 Months
content: The June issue of Kadokawa 's Comic Alive magazine published a new chapter of Ryū Naitō 's No Game, No Life Chapter 2: Eastern Union manga on Monday. This is the first chapter of the manga in 16 months since December 2024, when it went on hiatus.
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll to Stream Smoking Behind the Supermarket With You, 4 More 2026 Anime; Reveals English Dub Cast for Wistoria Season 2
content: Crunchyroll announced during its industry panel at CCXP Mexico on Saturday that it will stream six upcoming anime, including: Hanaori-san Still Wants to Fight in the Next Life , Reborn as a Space Mercenary: I Woke Up Piloting the Strongest Starship!
author: ANN
